summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Bull & Bear Trading Academy legal compliance updates. All 12 features tested and verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error when initiating payment - may be payment gateway configuration issue (not related to checkbox validation)

seed_data_creation: Created test user test_erwftw@test.com for checkbox validation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal compliance updates fully implemented and working. Payment gateway returning 500 error when attempting actual checkout - may need investigation if payment processing is required.

footer_payment_security_notice.details: Footer contains data-testid='payment-security-notice' with text 'Our website does not store users' card information. All payments are processed through secure and encrypted payment systems.'

footer_legal_links.details: Footer has links to /refund-policy (Refund & Exchange Policy) and /cancellation-policy (Cancellation & Payment Policy)

products_payment_security.details: Products page shows payment security notice with data-testid='products-payment-security'

products_checkbox.details: Products page has required checkbox with data-testid='payment-terms-checkbox' and label with data-testid='payment-terms-checkbox-label'

products_checkbox_validation.details: Clicking Pay without checking checkbox shows toast error 'Please agree to the payment terms and conditions before proceeding.'

refund_policy_page.details: Page loads at /refund-policy with title 'Refund & Exchange Policy', professional content, and business info (Emil Aliyev, VOEN 2306637202, Ganja city address)

cancellation_policy_page.details: Page loads at /cancellation-policy with title 'Cancellation & Payment Policy', payment security banner, and business info

about_page_business_info.details: About page has business info section with data-testid='business-info-section' showing Emil Aliyev, VOEN 2306637202, and Ganja city address

support_page_business_info.details: Support page shows Business Information section with Emil Aliyev, VOEN 2306637202, and Ganja city address

terms_section_14_business_info.details: Terms page Section 14 (Contact Information) contains Emil Aliyev, VOEN 2306637202, and Ganja city address

terms_section_4_payment_security.details: Terms page Section 4 (Payment Terms) contains payment security notice 'Our website does not store users' card information'

footer_bottom_links.details: Footer bottom section includes Refund Policy and Cancellation Policy links

test_execution_details.test_1_footer: Verified payment security notice and legal links in footer
test_execution_details.test_2_products_page: Verified payment security notice and terms checkbox
test_execution_details.test_3_checkbox_validation: Verified toast error when clicking Pay without checkbox
test_execution_details.test_4_refund_policy: Verified page content and business info
test_execution_details.test_5_cancellation_policy: Verified page content, payment security banner, and business info
test_execution_details.test_6_about_page: Verified business info section with all required data
test_execution_details.test_7_support_page: Verified business info section with all required data
test_execution_details.test_8_terms_page: Verified Section 4 and Section 14 contain required content
